citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Language is often ambiguous, but some possible meanings can be ruled out if they don't make sense. Computers are not yet as good as people at using context and world knowledge to make these judgments.
